problem_description: Perform an NPT ensemble simulation on a system of Aluminium atoms at 300K and 1 atm pressure for 100 ps.
output_description: The final temperature and pressure of the system after the NPT simulation should be close to the target values of 300K and 1 atm, respectively. The output should include a log file with thermodynamic data and a dump file with atomic configurations at specified intervals.
